productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Relentless Grey Sports Shoes
description: Designed for absolute comfort, the nike Air Relentless running shoe is stylish and comfortable. Its stylish upper makes it a great lifestyle footwear. Upper Heavily meshed upper for breathability, with synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with flex grooves for ease of movement Waffle-pattern lugs for grip and traction Scooped heel for extra cushioning to the backfoot Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
